name: Proof Theory — Sequent Calculus
description: Sequent Γ ⊢ Δ: multiset of formulas. Structural rules: weakening, contraction, exchange. Logical rules: left/right intro for ∧∨→¬∀∃. Cut rule.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Sequent\nΓ ⊢ Δ"]
    D2["Def: Axiom\nA ⊢ A"]
    R1["Rule: Weakening\nΓ⊢Δ ⇒ Γ,A⊢Δ"]
    R2["Rule: Contraction\nΓ,A,A⊢Δ ⇒ Γ,A⊢Δ"]
    R3["Rule: Cut\nΓ⊢A,Δ Γ',A⊢Δ' ⇒ Γ,Γ'⊢Δ,Δ'"]
    R4["Rule: Logical\nL∧ R∧ L∨ R∨ etc"]
    T1["Thm: Equivalence\nwith ND, Hilbert"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> R1
    D1 --> R2
    D1 --> R3
    D2 --> R4
    R4 --> T1
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef axiom fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2 definition
    class R1,R2,R3,R4 axiom
    class T1 theorem
